creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
This distfile has disappeared again:

root@portjail:/usr/ports/sysutils/eiciel # distilator .
404 [DISTFILE]  http://rofi.roger-ferrer.org/eiciel/download/eiciel-0.9.8.1.tar.bz2
200 [WWW]       http://rofi.roger-ferrer.org/eiciel/

I know the following portlint message is a warning only but I personally think a secondary master site should be mandatory these days.

WARN: Makefile: only one MASTER_SITE configured.  Consider adding additional mirrors.
